assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-14: '### 1. Check out the Target Branch (TC-9005)' with 'git checkout TC-9005' and 'git pull'. This is step 1, before creating the task branch in step 2.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 97: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table"'. Line 106 explicitly states: 'The PR uses --base TC-9005 to target the feature branch, NOT main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-24: '### 2. Create the task branch (TC-9205)' with 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 24 explicitly states: 'The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID (TC-9205), which is distinct from the Target Branch (TC-9005).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 28-38 under '## Pre-Implementation Code Inspection (Constraint 1.5)' lists all three files: (1) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- Read this file to understand the existing migration pattern', (2) 'entity/src/advisory.rs -- Read this file to verify that the status column is no longer referenced', (3) 'migration/src/lib.rs -- Read this file to understand how migrations are registered'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 74: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table'. The trailer value matches exactly.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 62-68 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat' and scope 'migration') and footer 'Implements TC-9205' referencing TC-9205.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 3-5: '## Target Branch Extraction' followed by 'The task description contains a **Target Branch** section with value **TC-9005**. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating feature-branch workflow. All branch operations and PR targeting must use TC-9005 as the base.'
